title: Blasted Gunpowder
description: Have you ever ran out of gunpowder? but have loads of Charcoal.
body:
# Description
Have you ever ran out of gunpowder? but have loads of Charcoal, well i got he solution for you!

Blasted Gunpowder is a light weight datapack that adds one simple datapack, which is?... allowing gunpowder to be obtained by blasing a charcoal that is inside a [Blast Furnace](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Blast_Furnace)!
